name: Looney Tunes: Wacky World of Sports
short_description: Get ready for Basketball, Soccer, Golf and Tennis combined into one Looney Tunes sport game! Gain power-ups to incite chaos against your friends and family as you control your favorite Looney Tunes character in 4-player, local co-op mayhem, but watch out for falling anvils!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Wacky World of Sports

Play against your friends featuring 4 classic sports: Basketball, Soccer, Golf and Tennis. Avoid the wacky obstacles and gain power-ups to incite chaos against your friends and family as you control your favorite Looney Tunes character. Play your way in this 4-player local co-op sports arcade game and choose the character that best suits your play style.

Key Game Features:

• Compete in 4 iconic sports: 2v2 arcade basketball, 1v1 or 2v2 arcade Tennis, 4-player golf, and 4v4 arcade soccer

• Play as 9 iconic Looney Tunes Characters: including Bugs Bunny, Lola Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, Elmer Fudd, Sylvester, Taz, Wile E. Coyote and the Road Runner

• Play Your Way: Speed by with Road Runner, Lola Bunny, or Sylvester; Overpower with brute force as Elmer Fudd, Porky Pig or Taz or outwit your opponents with Wile E. Coyote , Daffy or Bugs Bunny

• Play Against your Friends and Family: In 4-player Local Co-Op

• Experience the Looney Universe: playing across iconic levels such as Galactic Outpost Delta, Porky’s Barn, Foghorn’s Farm, Road Runner’s Canyon, Whispering Woods, Martian Command Center, Granny’s House, and many more!

• Unleash the full arsenal of ACME: and disrupt your opponents in the wackiest way possible, but watch out for falling anvils!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch
*languages with full audio support
